Examen

Adama SOW & Nicolas Ekanza-mapengo

22/04/2021

setwd("C:/Users/asow/Documents/R")
library(data.table)
donnee<-fread('BDD_data.csv')
colSums(is.na(donnee))
##            id          date         price      bedrooms     bathrooms 
##             0             0             0             0             0 
##   sqft_living      sqft_lot        floors    waterfront          view 
##             0             0             0             0             0 
##     condition         grade    sqft_above sqft_basement      yr_built 
##             0             0             0             0             0 
##  yr_renovated       zipcode           lat          long sqft_living15 
##             0             0             0             0             0 
##    sqft_lot15 
##             0
###on voit qu'il ya de donnees manquantes dans la base 
summary(donnee)
##        id                 date               price            bedrooms     
##  Min.   :   1000102   Length:21613       Min.   :  75000   Min.   : 0.000  
##  1st Qu.:2123049194   Class :character   1st Qu.: 321950   1st Qu.: 3.000  
##  Median :3904930410   Mode  :character   Median : 450000   Median : 3.000

##  3rd Qu.:7308900445                      3rd Qu.: 645000   3rd Qu.: 4.000

##    bathrooms      sqft_living       sqft_lot           floors     
##  Min.   :0.000   Min.   :  290   Min.   :    520   Min.   :1.000  
##  1st Qu.:1.750   1st Qu.: 1427   1st Qu.:   5040   1st Qu.:1.000

##    waterfront            view          condition         grade

##  Median :0.000000   Median :0.0000   Median :3.000   Median : 7.000

##  3rd Qu.:0.000000   3rd Qu.:0.0000   3rd Qu.:4.000   3rd Qu.: 8.000  
##  Max.   :1.000000   Max.   :4.0000   Max.   :5.000   Max.   :13.000  
##    sqft_above   sqft_basement       yr_built     yr_renovated

##  1st Qu.:1190   1st Qu.:   0.0   1st Qu.:1951   1st Qu.:   0.0

##     zipcode           lat             long        sqft_living15 
##  Min.   :98001   Min.   :47.16   Min.   :-122.5   Min.   : 399  
##  1st Qu.:98033   1st Qu.:47.47   1st Qu.:-122.3   1st Qu.:1490  
##  Median :98065   Median :47.57   Median :-122.2   Median :1840  
##  Mean   :98078   Mean   :47.56   Mean   :-122.2   Mean   :1987  
##  3rd Qu.:98118   3rd Qu.:47.68   3rd Qu.:-122.1   3rd Qu.:2360  
##  Max.   :98199   Max.   :47.78   Max.   :-121.3   Max.   :6210  
##    sqft_lot15

##  Max.   :871200

#Le prix moyen des maisons vendues est de 450000 dollars avec la maison la moins chère vendue pour 75000 dollars et la plus chère à 7700000,00 Dollars #Le nombre moyen de chambres pour les maisons vendues est de 3 avec un minimum de 0 chambre. Le nombre maximum de chambres = 33 est une valeur aberrante qui peut fausser les données et nombre moyen de salles de bain est de 2 avec un minimum de 0 salle de bain et un maximum de 8 salles de bain. #La surface habitable moyenne des maisons vendues est de 2080 pieds carrés, la plus petite étant de 290,00 pieds carrés et la plus grande surface habitable de 13540 pieds carrés. #Pour la plupart de nos variables continues, la moyenne est supérieure à la médiane et indique une asymétrie positive ( asymétrique à droite) du prix, sqft_lot, sqft_lot15 , sqft_above, sqft_basement, sqft_living et sqft_living15. #L’écart type est élevé dans le prix , sqft_lot, sqft_lot15, ce qui indique que les points de données sont largement répartis

donnee$view <- factor (donnee$view, levels = c("0", "1", "2","3","4"))
donnee$condition <- factor (donnee$condition, levels = c("3", "1", "2","4","5"))
donnee$waterfront <- factor (donnee$waterfront,levels = c("0","1"))
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
## Warning: package 'gridExtra' was built under R version 4.0.5
p1=ggplot(donnee, aes(x = donnee$sqft_living)) + geom_histogram(color = "white")
p2=ggplot(donnee, aes(x = donnee$sqft_living15)) + geom_histogram(color = "white")
p3=ggplot(donnee, aes(x = donnee$sqft_lot)) + geom_histogram(color = "white")
p4=ggplot(donnee, aes(x = donnee$price)) + geom_histogram(color = "white")

grid.arrange(p1, p2, p3,p4,ncol=2, nrow=2)
## `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value with `binwidth`.
## `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value with `binwidth`.
## `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value with `binwidth`.
## `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value with `binwidth`.

p5=ggplot(donnee, aes(x = donnee$bathrooms)) + geom_histogram(color = "white")
p6=ggplot(donnee, aes(x = donnee$sqft_basement)) + geom_histogram(color = "white")
p7=ggplot(donnee, aes(x = donnee$sqft_lot15)) + geom_histogram(color = "white")
p8=ggplot(donnee, aes(x = donnee$bedrooms)) + geom_histogram(color = "white")
grid.arrange(p5, p6, p7,p8,ncol=2, nrow=2)
## `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value with `binwidth`.
## `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value with `binwidth`.
## `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value with `binwidth`.
## `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value with `binwidth`.

variab=subset(donnee, select=-c(id,date,condition,view,waterfront))
library(car)
## Warning: package 'car' was built under R version 4.0.4
## Loading required package: carData
library(carData)
library(corrplot)
## Warning: package 'corrplot' was built under R version 4.0.4
## corrplot 0.84 loaded
corrplot(cor(variab),type = "lower", method = "number", is.corr = FALSE,bg="white",title = "",
         cex.main=0.7, diag = TRUE,tl.cex=0.8,number.cex=0.9,shade.col="black", number.font = 1,
         col= NULL,addgrid.col = "black", rect.lwd =2,tl.col = "black",tl.offset = 0.5,cl.ratio = 0.15)

##on peut concluire sqft_lot et sqft_above sont correlés

mo=lm(price~.-id-date-sqft_above,data=donnee)
mf=step(mo)
## Start:  AIC=527790.6
## price ~ (id + date + bedrooms + bathrooms + sqft_living + sqft_lot + 
##     floors + waterfront + view + condition + grade + sqft_above + 
##     sqft_basement + yr_built + yr_renovated + zipcode + lat + 
##     long + sqft_living15 + sqft_lot15) - id - date - sqft_above
## 
##                 Df  Sum of Sq        RSS    AIC
## <none>                        8.6945e+14 527791
## - floors         1 1.5431e+11 8.6960e+14 527792
## - sqft_lot       1 3.0189e+11 8.6975e+14 527796
## - sqft_lot15     1 1.0515e+12 8.7050e+14 527815
## - yr_renovated   1 1.1855e+12 8.7063e+14 527818
## - sqft_living15  1 1.5073e+12 8.7096e+14 527826
## - sqft_basement  1 2.1463e+12 8.7159e+14 527842
## - condition      4 5.7060e+12 8.7515e+14 527924
## - bathrooms      1 6.3946e+12 8.7584e+14 527947
## - long           1 1.0572e+13 8.8002e+14 528050
## - zipcode        1 1.2581e+13 8.8203e+14 528099
## - bedrooms       1 1.4194e+13 8.8364e+14 528139
## - waterfront     1 2.6748e+13 8.9620e+14 528443
## - view           4 2.9164e+13 8.9861e+14 528496
## - yr_built       1 5.1105e+13 9.2055e+14 529023
## - grade          1 8.1017e+13 9.5047e+14 529714
## - sqft_living    1 9.8118e+13 9.6757e+14 530100
## - lat            1 1.2641e+14 9.9586e+14 530722
summary(mf)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = price ~ (id + date + bedrooms + bathrooms + sqft_living + 
##     sqft_lot + floors + waterfront + view + condition + grade + 
##     sqft_above + sqft_basement + yr_built + yr_renovated + zipcode + 
##     lat + long + sqft_living15 + sqft_lot15) - id - date - sqft_above, 
##     data = donnee)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -1253272   -99230    -9330    77742  4361924 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                 Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)    7.274e+06  2.939e+06   2.475  0.01333 *  
## bedrooms      -3.543e+04  1.887e+03 -18.774  < 2e-16 ***
## bathrooms      4.097e+04  3.251e+03  12.601  < 2e-16 ***
## sqft_living    1.806e+02  3.659e+00  49.359  < 2e-16 ***
## sqft_lot       1.310e-01  4.783e-02   2.738  0.00619 ** 
## floors         7.038e+03  3.595e+03   1.957  0.05031 .  
## waterfront1    5.064e+05  1.965e+04  25.772  < 2e-16 ***
## view1          1.108e+05  1.128e+04   9.829  < 2e-16 ***
## view2          7.182e+04  6.857e+03  10.475  < 2e-16 ***
## view3          1.403e+05  9.419e+03  14.895  < 2e-16 ***
## view4          3.083e+05  1.441e+04  21.393  < 2e-16 ***
## condition1     5.821e+03  3.687e+04   0.158  0.87457    
## condition2     2.351e+04  1.555e+04   1.512  0.13055    
## condition4     2.351e+04  3.484e+03   6.749 1.53e-11 ***
## condition5     6.302e+04  5.562e+03  11.330  < 2e-16 ***
## grade          9.651e+04  2.152e+03  44.852  < 2e-16 ***
## sqft_basement -3.176e+01  4.351e+00  -7.300 2.97e-13 ***
## yr_built      -2.608e+03  7.321e+01 -35.623  < 2e-16 ***
## yr_renovated   1.984e+01  3.657e+00   5.426 5.84e-08 ***
## zipcode       -5.841e+02  3.305e+01 -17.675  < 2e-16 ***
## lat            6.006e+05  1.072e+04  56.025  < 2e-16 ***
## long          -2.126e+05  1.312e+04 -16.202  < 2e-16 ***
## sqft_living15  2.108e+01  3.446e+00   6.118 9.65e-10 ***
## sqft_lot15    -3.734e-01  7.308e-02  -5.110 3.25e-07 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 200700 on 21589 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.7015, Adjusted R-squared:  0.7012 
## F-statistic:  2206 on 23 and 21589 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
mff=lm(formula = log(price) ~ (id + date + bedrooms + bathrooms + sqft_living + 
    sqft_lot + floors + waterfront + view + condition + grade + 
    sqft_above + sqft_basement + yr_built + yr_renovated + zipcode + 
    lat + long + sqft_living15 + sqft_lot15) - id - date - sqft_above, 
    data = donnee)

par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(mff,1:4)

modelfinal=lm(formula = log(price) ~ (id + date + bedrooms + bathrooms + log(sqft_living) + 
    sqft_lot + floors + waterfront + view + condition + grade + bedrooms:log(sqft_living)+view:log(sqft_living)+
    sqft_above + sqft_basement + yr_built + yr_renovated + zipcode +
    lat + long + log(sqft_living15) + log(sqft_lot15)) - id - date - sqft_above, 
    data = donnee)
summary(modelfinal)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = log(price) ~ (id + date + bedrooms + bathrooms + 
##     log(sqft_living) + sqft_lot + floors + waterfront + view + 
##     condition + grade + bedrooms:log(sqft_living) + view:log(sqft_living) + 
##     sqft_above + sqft_basement + yr_built + yr_renovated + zipcode + 
##     lat + long + log(sqft_living15) + log(sqft_lot15)) - id - 
##     date - sqft_above, data = donnee)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -1.40802 -0.15711  0.00052  0.15199  1.34849 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                2.412e+00  3.701e+00   0.652  0.51459    
## bedrooms                  -3.954e-01  3.026e-02 -13.066  < 2e-16 ***
## bathrooms                  5.564e-02  4.064e-03  13.691  < 2e-16 ***
## log(sqft_living)           2.113e-01  1.424e-02  14.840  < 2e-16 ***
## sqft_lot                   8.837e-07  5.057e-08  17.473  < 2e-16 ***
## floors                     3.520e-02  4.833e-03   7.284 3.36e-13 ***
## waterfront1                4.204e-01  2.445e-02  17.192  < 2e-16 ***
## view1                      1.796e-01  2.544e-01   0.706  0.48032    
## view2                      4.543e-01  1.492e-01   3.045  0.00233 ** 
## view3                      3.605e-01  2.285e-01   1.577  0.11473    
## view4                      4.857e-01  2.601e-01   1.867  0.06185 .  
## condition1                -1.826e-01  4.579e-02  -3.987 6.70e-05 ***
## condition2                -9.810e-02  1.929e-02  -5.087 3.68e-07 ***
## condition4                 5.786e-02  4.334e-03  13.349  < 2e-16 ***
## condition5                 1.231e-01  6.899e-03  17.839  < 2e-16 ***
## grade                      1.629e-01  2.584e-03  63.063  < 2e-16 ***
## sqft_basement             -1.318e-05  5.550e-06  -2.374  0.01759 *  
## yr_built                  -3.634e-03  9.059e-05 -40.114  < 2e-16 ***
## yr_renovated               3.466e-05  4.538e-06   7.638 2.31e-14 ***
## zipcode                   -6.570e-04  4.099e-05 -16.028  < 2e-16 ***
## lat                        1.374e+00  1.332e-02 103.100  < 2e-16 ***
## long                      -1.045e-01  1.647e-02  -6.343 2.30e-10 ***
## log(sqft_living15)         2.200e-01  8.876e-03  24.792  < 2e-16 ***
## log(sqft_lot15)           -5.812e-02  3.187e-03 -18.235  < 2e-16 ***
## bedrooms:log(sqft_living)  4.896e-02  3.954e-03  12.381  < 2e-16 ***
## log(sqft_living):view1    -7.862e-04  3.273e-02  -0.024  0.98083    
## log(sqft_living):view2    -4.245e-02  1.916e-02  -2.216  0.02673 *  
## log(sqft_living):view3    -2.278e-02  2.881e-02  -0.791  0.42910    
## log(sqft_living):view4    -2.837e-02  3.234e-02  -0.877  0.38024    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2485 on 21584 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.7777, Adjusted R-squared:  0.7774 
## F-statistic:  2697 on 28 and 21584 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(modelfinal,1:4)

library(lmtest)
## Loading required package: zoo
## 
## Attaching package: 'zoo'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     as.Date, as.Date.numeric
bptest(modelfinal)
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  modelfinal
## BP = 1229.2, df = 28, p-value < 2.2e-16
u=resid(modelfinal)
g=log(u^2)
modelfinal_0=lm(formula = g ~(id + date + bedrooms + bathrooms + log(sqft_living) + 
    sqft_lot + floors + waterfront + view + condition + grade + bedrooms:log(sqft_living)+view:log(sqft_living)+
    sqft_above + sqft_basement + yr_built + yr_renovated + zipcode +
    lat + long + log(sqft_living15) + log(sqft_lot15)) - id - date - sqft_above, 
    data = donnee)
vaar=fitted(modelfinal_0)
h=exp(vaar)
donnee=cbind(donnee,h)
modele=lm(formula = log(price)~(id + date + bedrooms + bathrooms + log(sqft_living) + 
    sqft_lot + floors + waterfront + view + condition + grade + bedrooms:log(sqft_living)+view:log(sqft_living)+
    sqft_above + sqft_basement + yr_built + yr_renovated + zipcode +
    lat + long + log(sqft_living15) + log(sqft_lot15)) - id - date - sqft_above, data = donnee, weights = 1/h)
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(modele,1:4)

donnees_moins_aberrants <- donnee[cooks.distance(modele) <= 1,]
modelfinal__1=lm(formula = log(price) ~ (id + date + bedrooms + bathrooms + log(sqft_living) + 
    sqft_lot + floors + waterfront + view + condition + grade + bedrooms:log(sqft_living)+view:log(sqft_living)+
    sqft_above + sqft_basement + yr_built + yr_renovated + zipcode +
    lat + long + log(sqft_living15) + log(sqft_lot15)) - id - date - sqft_above, 
    data =donnees_moins_aberrants,weights = 1/h)
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(modelfinal__1,1:4)

predict(modele, data=donnees_moins_aberrants)
